parameters: アニメーションタイプ = def
\SM[pop]\SE[10]Yeah, then see you later... I guess? Fufuh--, byebye~♪
You come to places like these too, huh~?
\SE[33-nb]I come here sometimes, to read a whole lot of manga in one sitting~.
It's great for reading the sort of stuff that you're interested in
but would rather not... buy, you know?
\SE[30-nb]Am I going to be late home? Fufuh--, are you worried about me?
Eheheh, I'll make sure not to be, so don't worry. Thanks~♪
\SM[pop]\SE[10]Yeah, then see you later... I guess? Fufuh--, byebye~♪
スライドスピード = def
She walked from one book case to another while carrying a mountain
of manga. There's no reason for me to get in the way of her fun.
アニメーションタイプ = def
\SE[8](I did think I could hear some strange noises, I never thought...)
\SE[42](It's the couples' box up ahead, isn't it? That means they're
definitely doing something lewd in there...)
\sa[130]\SE[13](In such an open place too, where it's basically an open secret...
Is that just normal, I wonder?)
\SM[tremble]\sa[128]\SE[27](Wait, am I gonna do it like that with \n[1] too? Wah, thinking about it is--
...What do I do, am I actually a lewd girl...)
\SE[54-nb](I know it's not anything good but...
...I was just spacing out, that's all.
\sa[126]\SE[31-nb]Me? I was thinking of staying a bit... no, I guess I'll
\SE[55-nb](I'm not really in the mood to read manga anymore anyway...)
\SM[attack]\SE[36-nb]E-Eheheh, are you going home too, \n[1]? Let's go home together then.
....I'll go pay my bill so just wait outside for me.
スライドスピード = def
And so we left for home, though with her seeming a bit lost and strange in equal measures.
She was a whole lot more talkative than usual, and when I stopped
by a vending machine, she didn't and instead just hurried on home.
...Wonder if she had to use the bathroom?
...Nothing I could do about it if so, I commented while slowly
finishing my can of juice at the entrance before making my way up myself.
\se[28]\SA[128](Gosh... I feel really weird... I hope \n[1] didn't notice...)
スライドスピード = def
Yo, \n[1]! I've been here ever since they announced the free attendance period~

The other day, I saw your wife come in here! She just doesn't fit in a place like this, 
you know~?
If you get a job here, you can read manga all day every day~
I just saw the staff drinking one of the free drinks just now without a care.
I'm so jealous of couples that come to places like these~
All the volumes except volume 5 of the book I want to read are here... what a pain...
